Frequently Asked Questions

Answers to common repair questions.

How long do repairs take?+
Most repairs are completed within 30 minutes to 3 hours depending on the issue.
Do you offer warranty?+
Yes. Selected repairs include a service warranty for customer peace of mind.
Can I get an instant quote?+
Yes. Contact us directly on WhatsApp for a fast estimate.
Do you repair all phone brands?+
Yes. We repair iPhone, Samsung, Tecno, Infinix, Redmi, Oppo, Huawei, and more.
